name: Hudbay Minerals Inc.
content: Hudbay Minerals Inc. is a diversified mining company primarily focused on the discovery, production, and marketing of base and precious metals. Headquartered in Toronto, Canada, the company operates long-life assets in North and South America, including mines in Manitoba, British Columbia, and Peru, as well as development projects in Arizona and Nevada. Hudbay is a leading producer of copper, gold, and zinc, committed to sustainable mining practices and creating long-term value for its stakeholders through efficient operations and strategic exploration.
